name: MbShot — bot screenshot bridge
description: Private session D-Bus screenshot service for the ThinkPad ops-bot. Exposes org.local.MbShot (Ping / Capture / CaptureArea) using the GNOME Shell's internal screenshot API, so the bot can capture the screen headlessly on GNOME Wayland — where grim (no wlr-screencopy), the Shell.Screenshot D-Bus (AccessDenied), and the portal (interactive) all fail.
